meta-description: Learn about out-of-network coinsurance by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Out-of-network coinsurance
excerpt: The percentage (for example, 40%) you pay of the allowed amount for covered health care services to providers who don't contract with your health insurance or plan. Out-of-network coinsurance usually costs you more than in-network coinsurance.
content: The percentage (for example, 40%) you pay of the allowed amount for covered health care services to providers who don't contract with your health insurance or plan. Out-of-network coinsurance usually costs you more than in-network coinsurance.
